description: Default 'basic assumption' model per agent. Used ONLY when the live runtime model is hidden by the host. Owner directive (2026-06-17): the model is normally always known in chat; if the runtime hides it, compute money by the agent's baseline profile (NOT a model_required dead-end). Every report built from a profile marks model_binding.source='basic_assumption_due_hidden_runtime', confidence='assumed'. Each profile model MUST exist with status 'active' in model_prices.json.

claude-code.rationale: Claude Code baseline is Sonnet-class when the exact runtime model is hidden.

codex.rationale: Codex baseline = gpt-5.5 (medium effort); price basis is gpt-5.5.

openclaw.rationale: OpenClaw baseline = gpt-5.5 (medium effort); price basis is gpt-5.5.

notes: Chinese-agent baseline profiles (Qwen/Kimi/Zhipu-GLM) are added ONLY once concrete active model+price entries exist in model_prices.json.
A profile is an assumption, never an exact reading; the report must say so plainly and never claim the assumed model was the real runtime model.
